nasb.text: Now there were seven brothers with us; and the first married and died, and having no children left his wife to his brother;

esv.text: Now there were seven brothers among us. The first married and died, and having no offspring left his wife to his brother.

cnv.text: 從前我們這裡有兄弟七人，頭一個結了婚，沒有孩子就死了，留下妻子給他的弟弟。

ccb.text: 从前，我们这里有弟兄七人，老大结了婚，没有孩子就死了，把妻子留给了弟弟。

csbs.text: 我们这里曾经有兄弟七人，第一个结了婚，死了，没有后裔，留下妻子给他的一个兄弟。
